calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Approving Assignment Of Interests In Estate And Authorizing Distribution Directly To Finders International
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Dennis Zell appeared via zoom for Rich Casem (petitioner).
Debbie Jones appeared via zoom for Finders International and Alliance Estate Research.

Discussion was held regarding retaining the attorney from the Philippines, that it would help distributing the money and getting a receipt signed, that this was a recommendation by the law firm, and that they knew the attorney personally.

The Court denied the request to approve administrator's proposal to hire an agent to distribute and identify errors.

The Court granted the final report of administration, accounting and Petition for Final Distribution. The matter is taken under submission.

The Court granted the heir finders petition but only as to their being entitled to distribution as requested and not approving the agreements. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Continued To May-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Dennis Zell appearing via zoom for Petitioner Richard Casem.
Terri Popkes appearing via zoom for Debbie Jones on behalf of Alliance estate research.

The Court questions why a petition for approval of a status report has not been filed. Mr. Zell stated that he filed a petition to ascertain heirs as instructed by the examiner and that a Petition for final distribution was filed but then withdrawn. Mr. Zell also stated there are dozens and dozens of heirs in the Philippines, that there is a heir hunting company that needs to file proof of enforceability of here contract, and that as soon as the heirship petition is approved, he will file a petition for final distribution. Ms. Popkes is in favor of the heirship petition and that she is not aware of needs to be done. Status on close of estate is continued to May 03, 2023. Alliance research is to file something prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: E. Pliego. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Petition To Ascertain Heirs
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Zell, via ZOOM, for Rich Casem, Administrator; Debbie Jones, via ZOOM, for Alliance Estate Research, LLC, Assignee.

The court queries Mr. Zell regarding confirmation of the date of death of the five (5) individuals. Mr. Zell reports that that information has yet to be obtained but that he has been working with an attorney in the Philippines to confirm the preceding but that there have been issues in obtaining information. The court requests an update regarding Dario's successors in interest. Mr. Zell reports that he has been advised by the attorney in the Philippines that no successors in interest have been determined. The court turns to the issue of the five (5) individuals who have not received notice. Mr. Zell reports that he has been working with the attorney in the Philippines to resolve the issue - he also reports that his office has received notices that have been returned as undeliverable and that he has notified the Philippines attorney of the returned mail. Mr. Zell advises that he should have a petition for final distribution ready to file within forty-five (45) days. Mr. Zell and the court then discuss the plan for delivery of funds to the heirs if the court grants his petition for final distribution. Mr. Zell states that he has been discussing the preceding with the Philippines attorney and one idea is having the heirs meet the attorney in person to make distributions but that it may be difficult for all heirs to appear in person due to their location. Ms. Jones reports that she has also discussed with her client the possible logistical issues with distribution to heirs in the Philippines but that she will continue to discuss the issue with her client and will subsequently report to Mr. Zell. The court advises the parties that notice of this petition only is dispensed as to the individuals whose addresses cannot be determined. The court notes that it will require a new proposed order and instructs Mr. Zell to forward the new proposed order to the assigned Examiner.

The Petition to Ascertain Heirs is submitted. The Status on Close of Estate is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
